<?php namespace Illuminate\Http\Middleware; use Closure; use Illuminate\Http\Exceptions\MalformedUrlException; use Illuminate\Http\Request; class ValidatePathEncoding { /** * Validate that the incoming request has a valid UTF-8 encoded path. * * @param \Illuminate\Http\Request $request * @param \Closure $next * @return \Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response */ public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next) { $decodedPath = rawurldecode($request->path()); if (! mb_check_encoding($decodedPath, 'UTF-8')) { throw new MalformedUrlException; } return $next($request); } }
